"use client"; import { Search, Filter, Columns, Plus, MoreHorizontal, ChevronLeft, ChevronRight, Activity, AlertTriangle, AlertCircle, SearchCheck } from "lucide-react"; import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input"; import { StatusChip } from "@/components/ui/status-chip"; import { mockScans, mockDashboardStats } from "@/lib/mock-data"; import { useRouter } from "next/navigation"; import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"; export default function DashboardPage() { const router = useRouter(); const handleRowClick = (id: string) => { router.push(`/dashboard/scans/${id}`); }; return (
{/* Top Banner Stats */}
Org: {mockDashboardStats.org}
Owner: {mockDashboardStats.owner}
Total Scans: {mockDashboardStats.totalScans}
Scheduled: {mockDashboardStats.scheduled}
Rescans: {mockDashboardStats.rescans}
Failed Scans: {mockDashboardStats.failed}
{mockDashboardStats.lastUpdated}
{/* Critical */}
Critical Severity
{mockDashboardStats.critical.count} ↑ {mockDashboardStats.critical.change} increase than yesterday
{/* High */}
High Severity
{mockDashboardStats.high.count} ↑ {mockDashboardStats.high.change} increase than yesterday
{/* Medium */}
Medium Severity
{mockDashboardStats.medium.count} ↓ {mockDashboardStats.medium.change} decrease than yesterday
{/* Low */}
Low Severity
{mockDashboardStats.low.count} ↑ {mockDashboardStats.low.change} increase than yesterday
{/* Main Table Area */}
{/* Toolbar */}
{/* Table */}
{mockScans.map((scan) => ( handleRowClick(scan.id)} className="hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer group flex flex-col md:table-row py-4 md:py-0 border-b md:border-b-0" > ))}
Scan Name Type Status Progress Vulnerability Last Scan
Scan Name {scan.name} Type {scan.type} Status
Progress {scan.progress}%
{scan.progress}%
Vulnerability
{scan.vulnerabilities.critical > 0 && {scan.vulnerabilities.critical}} {scan.vulnerabilities.high > 0 && {scan.vulnerabilities.high}} {scan.vulnerabilities.medium > 0 && {scan.vulnerabilities.medium}} {scan.vulnerabilities.low > 0 && {scan.vulnerabilities.low}}
Last Scan {scan.lastScan}
{/* Pagination/Footer */}
Showing {mockScans.length} of {mockDashboardStats.totalScans} Scans
); }

messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

"use client"; import { usePathname, useRouter } from "next/navigation"; import { ArrowLeft, PlayCircle, RefreshCcw, Download, XOctagon, CheckCircle2, ChevronDown, ListFilter, Play, ActivitySquare, Terminal, Eye, Search } from "lucide-react"; import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge"; import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button"; import { mockSteps, mockTerminalLogs, mockFindings } from "@/lib/mock-data"; import { cn } from "@/lib/utils"; export default function ScanDetailPage({ params }: { params: { id: string } }) { const router = useRouter(); return (
{/* Top Breadcrumb & Actions */}
router.push('/dashboard')}>Scan / Private Assets / New Scan
{/* Progress Card */}
{/* Circular Progress */}
{/* Inner text */}
0% In Progress
{/* The teal progress ring could be done with SVG, but using a simple representation for now */}
{/* Stepper */}
{/* Connecting line */}
{mockSteps.map((step) => (
{step.id === 'spidering' && } {step.id === 'mapping' && } {step.id === 'testing' && } {step.id === 'validating' && } {step.id === 'reporting' && }
{step.label}
))}
{/* Metadata Row */}
Scan Type Grey Box
Targets google.com
Started At Nov 22, 09:00AM
Credentials 2 Active
Files Control.pdf
Checklists 40/350
{/* Bottom Split Layout */}
{/* Left Panel - Live Console */}
{/* Console Header */}
Live Scan Console
Running...
{/* Console Tabs */}
{/* Console Output */}
{mockTerminalLogs.map((log, i) => (
[{log.time}]{" "} {log.text.split('\n').map((line, j) => ( {line.split(new RegExp(`(${log.highlight}|${log.highlightUrl}|${log.highlightKeyword}|${log.codeHighlight}|${log.boldHighlight})`, 'gi')).map((part, k) => { if (log.highlight && part === log.highlight) return {part}; if (log.highlightUrl && part === log.highlightUrl) return {part}; if (log.codeNode && part.includes(log.codeNode)) return {part}; if (log.highlightKeyword && part === log.highlightKeyword) return {part}; if (log.codeHighlight && part === log.codeHighlight) return {part}; if (log.boldHighlight && part === log.boldHighlight) return {part}; return part; })} ))}
))}
{/* Console Footer Status */}
Sub-Agents: 0
Parallel Executions: 2
Operations: 1
Critical: 0 High: 0 Medium: 0 Low: 0
{/* Right Panel - Finding Log */}
Finding Log 3 New
{mockFindings.map((finding) => (
{finding.severity} {finding.time}

{finding.title}

{finding.path}

{finding.desc}

))}
); }

messages.message: An interface declaring no members is equivalent to its supertype.

suggestions.desc: Replace empty interface with a type alias.
